SEARCH
Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI

Class GUIView

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.View
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GUIView
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable
public class GUIView extends View
GUI representation of the client-side view.

    Method
    Description
    void
    addChat(String nickname)
    Adds a new chat tab for the specified nickname if it doesn't already exist.
    void
    chooseConnection()
    Initiates the connection process by setting up the GUI view for connection and launching the ChooseConnectionController.
    void
    displayFirstMessage(int clientID)
    Displays the first message upon successful connection, showing an information alert.

    Displays the list of available games in the lobby GUI controller.

    getChatOptions()
    Retrieves the list of available chat options.

    Retrieves the current stage of the GUI.
    void
    notifyAvailablePositions(ArrayList<Coordinate> coord)
    Notifies the GUI that the available positions have been changed.
    void
    notifyChatMessage(ChatMessage message)
    Notifies the GUI about a new chat message received.
    void
    notifyColorChosen(PlayerColor color)
    Notifies the GUI that a player chose a color
    void
    notifyColorsAvailable(List<PlayerColor> colors)
    Notifies the GUI that the available player colors have been updated.
    void
    notifyCurrentPlayer(String nickname)
    Notifies the GUI of the current player's turn.
    void
    notifyCurrentPlayerHasPlayed(boolean bool)
    Notifies the CLI when the player has played a card
    void

    Notifies the GUI that the displayed cards have been updated.
    void
    notifyDisplayedObjectives(List<ObjectiveCard> cards)
    Notifies the GUI about updates to the common objective cards.
    void
    notifyException(String message)
    Notifies the user of a game-related exception by displaying an error alert.
    void
    notifyGameJoined(int idGame)
    Notifies the GUI that the client has joined a game.
    void
    notifyGameState(GameState state)
    Notifies the GUI about changes in the game state and updates the corresponding views accordingly
    void
    notifyGoldDeckUpdate()
    Notifies the GUI that the gold deck has been updated.

    notifyGridUpdate(String nickname, Map<Coordinate,Face> grid)
    Notifies the GUI about updates to the grid for a specific player.
    void
    notifyHandCardsUpdate(ArrayList<PlayableCard> cards)
    Notifies the GUI about updates to the hand cards of the current player.
    void
    notifyHandObjectives(ArrayList<ObjectiveCard> cards)
    Notifies the GUI about updates to the hand of objective cards.
    void
    notifyNewPlayerJoined(ArrayList<String> nicknames)
    Notifies the GUI that new players have joined the game.
    void
    notifyResourceDeckUpdate()
    Notifies the GUI that the resource deck has been updated.
    void

    Notified the GUI that the resource count has been changed.
    void

    Notifies the GUI about updates to the scores of players in the game.

    Notifies the GUI that the starter card has been chosen.
    void

    Notifies the GUI about the winner of the game and displays final scores in an alert dialog.

    Opens the window for creating a new game.

    Opens the waiting screen.

  • Constructor Details

    • GUIView

      public GUIView()
      Initializes GUIView with default chat options and a global chat.

  • Method Details

    • getChatOptions

      public javafx.collections.ObservableList<String> getChatOptions()
      Retrieves the list of available chat options.
      Returns:
      ObservableList of chat options.

    • getChats

      public Map<String,javafx.collections.ObservableList<ChatMessage>> getChats()
      Retrieves the map of chat messages
      Returns:
      Map of chat messages.

    • openLobby

      public void openLobby()
      Opens the lobby GUI.

    • openCreateGameWindow

      public void openCreateGameWindow()
      Opens the window for creating a new game.

    • openWaiting

      public void openWaiting()
      Opens the waiting screen.

    • showConnectionError

      public void showConnectionError()
      Displays a connection error alert.

    • chooseConnection

      public void chooseConnection()
      Initiates the connection process by setting up the GUI view for connection and launching the ChooseConnectionController. This method starts a new thread to handle the application launch for the connection controller.
      Specified by:
      chooseConnection in class View

    • notifyException

      public void notifyException(String message)
      Notifies the user of a game-related exception by displaying an error alert.
      Specified by:
      notifyException in class View
      Parameters:
      message - The error message to display in the alert.

    • displayFirstMessage

      public void displayFirstMessage(int clientID)
      Displays the first message upon successful connection, showing an information alert.
      Specified by:
      displayFirstMessage in class View
      Parameters:
      clientID - The ID of the client for which the connection was established.

    • displayGameList

      public void displayGameList(HashMap<Integer,Integer> gameList)
      Displays the list of available games in the lobby GUI controller.
      Specified by:
      displayGameList in class View
      Parameters:
      gameList - A HashMap containing the list of game IDs and their respective player counts.

    • notifyGameJoined

      public void notifyGameJoined(int idGame)
      Notifies the GUI that the client has joined a game. Opens the waiting screen and sets the player nickname in the waiting controller if available.
      Specified by:
      notifyGameJoined in class View
      Parameters:
      idGame - The ID of the game that the client has joined.

    • notifyNewPlayerJoined

      public void notifyNewPlayerJoined(ArrayList<String> nicknames)
      Notifies the GUI that new players have joined the game. Updates the waiting screen with the newly joined players' nicknames and adds them to the chat list.
      Specified by:
      notifyNewPlayerJoined in class View
      Parameters:
      nicknames - The list of nicknames of the new players who have joined.

    • addChat

      public void addChat(String nickname)
      Adds a new chat tab for the specified nickname if it doesn't already exist.
      Parameters:
      nickname - The nickname of the player to add a new chat tab for.

    • notifyStarterCard

      public void notifyStarterCard()
      Notifies the GUI that the starter card has been chosen.
      Specified by:
      notifyStarterCard in class View

    • notifyColorsAvailable

      public void notifyColorsAvailable(List<PlayerColor> colors)
      Notifies the GUI that the available player colors have been updated.
      Specified by:
      notifyColorsAvailable in class View
      Parameters:
      colors - The list of available player colors.

    • notifyGoldDeckUpdate

      public void notifyGoldDeckUpdate()
      Notifies the GUI that the gold deck has been updated.
      Specified by:
      notifyGoldDeckUpdate in class View

    • notifyResourceDeckUpdate

      public void notifyResourceDeckUpdate()
      Notifies the GUI that the resource deck has been updated.
      Specified by:
      notifyResourceDeckUpdate in class View

    • notifyDisplayedCardsUpdate

      public void notifyDisplayedCardsUpdate(ArrayList<PlayableCard> displayedCards)
      Notifies the GUI that the displayed cards have been updated.
      Specified by:
      notifyDisplayedCardsUpdate in class View
      Parameters:
      displayedCards - The list of playable cards to be displayed.

    • notifyCurrentPlayer

      public void notifyCurrentPlayer(String nickname)
      Notifies the GUI of the current player's turn. It checks which controller is currently active and sets the turn accordingly.
      Specified by:
      notifyCurrentPlayer in class View
      Parameters:
      nickname - The nickname of the current player.

    • notifyAvailablePositions

      public void notifyAvailablePositions(ArrayList<Coordinate> coord)
      Notifies the GUI that the available positions have been changed.
      Specified by:
      notifyAvailablePositions in class View
      Parameters:
      coord - the List of available position.

    • notifyHandObjectives

      public void notifyHandObjectives(ArrayList<ObjectiveCard> cards)
      Notifies the GUI about updates to the hand of objective cards.
      Specified by:
      notifyHandObjectives in class View
      Parameters:
      cards - The list of objective cards to be displayed in the GUI.

    • notifyGameState

      public void notifyGameState(GameState state)
      Notifies the GUI about changes in the game state and updates the corresponding views accordingly. *
      Specified by:
      notifyGameState in class View
      Parameters:
      state - The current state of the game.

    • notifyGridUpdate

      public void notifyGridUpdate(String nickname, Map<Coordinate,Face> grid)
      Notifies the GUI about updates to the grid for a specific player.
      Specified by:
      notifyGridUpdate in class View
      Parameters:
      nickname - The nickname of the player whose grid is being updated.
      grid - The updated grid

    • notifyResourcesUpdate

      public void notifyResourcesUpdate(String nickname, HashMap<Content,Integer> resources)
      Notified the GUI that the resource count has been changed.
      Specified by:
      notifyResourcesUpdate in class View
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player whose resources have been changed
      resources - the new resources count

    • notifyWinnerUpdate

      public void notifyWinnerUpdate(String nickname)
      Notifies the GUI about the winner of the game and displays final scores in an alert dialog.
      Specified by:
      notifyWinnerUpdate in class View
      Parameters:
      nickname - The nickname of the player who has won the game.

    • notifyHandCardsUpdate

      public void notifyHandCardsUpdate(ArrayList<PlayableCard> cards)
      Notifies the GUI about updates to the hand cards of the current player.
      Specified by:
      notifyHandCardsUpdate in class View
      Parameters:
      cards - The list of playable cards in the current player's hand.

    • notifyDisplayedObjectives

      public void notifyDisplayedObjectives(List<ObjectiveCard> cards)
      Notifies the GUI about updates to the common objective cards.
      Specified by:
      notifyDisplayedObjectives in class View
      Parameters:
      cards - the List of new common objective cards

    • notifyScores

      public void notifyScores(Map<String,Integer> scores)
      Notifies the GUI about updates to the scores of players in the game.
      Specified by:
      notifyScores in class View
      Parameters:
      scores - A map containing player nicknames as keys and their corresponding scores as values.

      Notifies the GUI that a player chose a color

      notifyColorChosen in class View
